metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins for development workflows and memory

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Agentic skills framework & development methodology. TDD, debugging, planning, code review, and collaboration patterns.

plugins.name: engram
plugins.description: Semantic memory for Claude Code. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns across sessions.

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Create custom hooks via markdown files. Analyze conversations to find unwanted behaviors automatically.
